description: Humanizer Generate/Rewrite diverse test matrix v3. Broader topic coverage than v2 (work, personal, service, health-adjacent-but-safe, scheduling, money, complaints, gratitude) plus edge cases: very short ideas, run-on ideas, ideas with numbers/dates, ideas with no clear ask, and multi-recipient framing. Each case uses a distinct idea so no fix can hide behind a repeated prompt.

cases.input: Tell my team the Friday standup is moving to 10am starting next week.
Ask the internet provider why my bill went up by $15 this month.
Explain to the new engineer that the staging database gets wiped every night at 2am, so any test data they need has to be re-seeded each morning using the seed script in the repo.

cases.test_name: Very short idea (minimal input stress test)
cases.input: reschedule dentist
need to ask my HOA if i can repaint my front door a different color and also whether i need to submit paint samples first before they approve anything

cases.test_name: Idea containing specific numbers/dates (must be preserved exactly)
cases.input: Ask my insurance company why claim #48213 filed on June 3rd hasn't been processed yet.
Ask my roommate to switch grocery shopping weeks with me.
Thank my mentor for the advice they gave me about negotiating my job offer.
Tell the restaurant the delivery order arrived an hour late and two items were missing.
Ask the event venue to confirm the room setup: 8 round tables, a projector and screen, a microphone with stand, catering access by 4pm, and parking for 30 cars.

cases.test_name: Permanent note - factual detail must be grounded
cases.input: Ask my doctor's office to send my referral to the specialist.

cases.test_name: Permanent note - tone override vs explicit setting conflict
cases.input: Ask my landlord to fix the broken heater.
cases.permanent_note: Always keep emails to my landlord blunt and to the point.

cases.input: Ask HR about the status of my expense reimbursement.
cases.permanent_note: Always sign off with my full name, Marcus Webb.

cases.input: Ask a wedding photographer for their availability and package pricing for a Saturday in October.
Ask my child's teacher for a quick update on how they're doing in math this semester.
Following up with the contractor about the kitchen renovation.
Let both co-founders know the investor call got pushed to Thursday at 3pm.
The supplier delayed the shipment by two weeks.
We need 40 units by March 12th, not 30.

cases.test_name: Long length with genuinely sparse idea (retry/threshold stress test)
cases.input: ask neighbor to trim the hedge
